title: Integrated Lucky Blocks
description: A brand new take on the classic Lucky Block with built-in mod integrations
body: Integrated Lucky Blocks is a brand new take on the classic Lucky Block genre! With over 100 vanilla outcomes and over 300 with all compatibilites, there are loads of surprises waiting to be opened.  Drops include items, structures, mobs, and a plethora of other events. They can be rather destructive so be careful where you open them! Mod Compatibiliities: Alex's Caves Alex's Mobs Create The Outer End Jellyfishing 'Dustrial Decor Caverns and Chasms Blighted Beasts Vouniern's Turrets Artifacts Dimensional Doors Rotten Creatures Compound V Jolly Boxes Born in Chaos L_Ender's Cataclysm Species Opposing Force Invincible: Conquest Leave any requests for more mod compatibilities in the comments or in my discord!
